zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Iwardby於1449年10月12日出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利 瓦爾時，他的父親Nicholas Iwardby24歲，母親Elizabeth Hampden23歲。他於1474年與Joan Frances Brudenell在英國巴金哈姆爾華頓結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年8月22日在英國萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯享年35歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾達德林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Iwardby于1449年10月12日出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利 瓦爾时，他的父亲Nicholas Iwardby24岁，母亲Elizabeth Hampden23岁。他于1474年与Joan Frances Brudenell在英国巴金哈姆爾華頓结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1485年8月22日在英国萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯享年35岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾達德林頓。

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Iwardby was born on 12 October 1449, in Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Iwardby, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Hampden, was 23. He married Joan Frances Brudenell in 1474, in Quainton, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died on 22 August 1485, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in Dadlington, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Iwardby est né le 12 octobre 1449, à Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Iwardby, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hampden, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan Frances Brudenell en 1474, à Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé le 22 août 1485, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Dadlington, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England: Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Iwardby am 12. Oktober 1449 in Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Iwardby 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Hampden 23. Er hat 1474 in Quainton, Buckinghamshire, England Joan Frances Brudenell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 22. August 1485 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Dadlington, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Iwardby è nato il il 12 ottobre 1449 nel Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas Iwardby, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Hampden, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joan Frances Brudenell nel 1474, nel Quainton, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 22 agosto 1485, nel Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Dadlington, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Iwardbyが1449年10月12日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリー ベルで生まれた時，父Nicholas Iwardbyは24歳，母Elizabeth Hampdenは23歳であった。1474年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアクアイントンでJoan Frances Brudenellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年8月22日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで35歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアダドリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Iwardby(이)가 1449년 10월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이 발에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Iwardby(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hampden(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1474년 영국 벅잉함실르 퀄인턴에서 Joan Frances Brudenell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 8월 22일 영국 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 다들링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England: Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Iwardby nasceu em 12 de outubro de 1449, em Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas Iwardby, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hampden, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Frances Brudenell em 1474, em Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1485, em Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Dadlington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ro.Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England: Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Iwardby родился 12 октября 1449 г. в местности аилесбури веил, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Iwardby было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hampden, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Frances Brudenell в 1474 г. в местности куеинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер 22 августа 1485 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности дадлингтон, лисестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Joan Frances Brudenell en 1474, en Quainton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1485, en Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Dadlington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
